Ladyironchef Popular Indonesian coffee chain Tanamera Coffee & Roastery has opened a new outlet in Serangoon Gardens on 12 August. Taking over the former unit of Maison Kayser on the ground floor of MyVillage, this is Tanamera Coffee's 9th outlet in Singapore.

#01-26/27/28 MyVillage at Serangoon Gardens
Singapore 556679

Ladyironchef Seafood Paradise is having its first-ever four-hands collaboration with Ms. Maria & Mr. Singh (Singapore), the casual offshoot restaurant by Michelin-starred Chef Gaggan Anand.
From 1 Nov 2023, enjoy six specially created Singapore-style seafood dishes elevated with Indian-Mexican influences at Seafood Paradise VivoCity and Clarke Quay outlets for a limited time only.
Highlights include:
🦪
Fresh Jumbo Canadian Oyster with Salsa Taquera and Tobiko
🦑
Grilled Squid served with Salsa Taquera
🦀
Gaggan's Crab Curry with Seafood Paradise Creamy Butter Mud Crab
🦐
Stir-fried Live Tiger Pra
